allow: Bash(xargs grep -l "device_id\\|tenant_id\\|ota\\|OTA")

Bash(ssh root@204.168.157.20 "cat /etc/mosquitto/mosquitto.conf")
Bash(ssh root@204.168.157.20 "ls /etc/mosquitto/conf.d/ && cat /etc/mosquitto/conf.d/*.conf")
Bash(ssh root@204.168.157.20 "sudo -u postgres psql -d modesp_cloud -c ""\\dt""")

Bash(ssh root@204.168.157.20 "sudo -u postgres psql -d modesp_cloud -c ""\\dp app_config"" 2>&1; sudo -u postgres psql -d modesp_cloud -c ""SELECT rolname FROM pg_roles WHERE rolname LIKE ''modesp%''""")
Bash(npm test)
Bash(ssh root@204.168.157.20 "cd /opt/modesp-cloud && git pull origin main")

Bash(ssh root@204.168.157.20 "cp /opt/modesp-cloud/infra/mosquitto/mosquitto.conf /etc/mosquitto/conf.d/modesp.conf && sed -i ''s/CHANGE_ME_STRONG_RO_PASSWORD/hBGsfDP9EjCzwvs2WuK16w==/'' /etc/mosquitto/conf.d/modesp.conf && grep ''pg_password'' /etc/mosquitto/conf.d/modesp.conf")
Bash(ssh root@204.168.157.20 "systemctl restart mosquitto && sleep 2 && systemctl status mosquitto --no-pager -l")
Bash(ssh root@204.168.157.20 "systemctl restart modesp-backend && sleep 2 && systemctl status modesp-backend --no-pager -l | head -20")

Bash(ssh root@204.168.157.20 "sudo -u postgres psql modesp_cloud -c ""SELECT sub.prefix || acl.suffix FROM \(SELECT CASE WHEN d.status = ''pending'' THEN ''modesp/v1/pending/'' || d.mqtt_device_id WHEN d.status = ''active'' THEN ''modesp/v1/'' || t.slug || ''/'' || d.mqtt_device_id END AS prefix FROM devices d LEFT JOIN tenants t ON t.id = d.tenant_id WHERE d.mqtt_username = ''device_E00008'' AND d.status IN \(''pending'', ''active''\)\) sub CROSS JOIN \(SELECT ''/state/+'' AS suffix, 2 AS rw UNION ALL SELECT ''/status'', 2 UNION ALL SELECT ''/heartbeat'', 2 UNION ALL SELECT ''/cmd/+'', 1\) acl WHERE \(acl.rw = 4 OR \(4 = 4 AND acl.rw = 1\)\) AND sub.prefix IS NOT NULL;""")

Bash(ssh root@204.168.157.20 "sudo -u postgres psql modesp_cloud -c ""SELECT mqtt_device_id, mqtt_username, status, tenant_id FROM devices WHERE mqtt_device_id IN \(''E00008'', ''E00001'', ''E00002'', ''F27FCD''\) ORDER BY mqtt_device_id;""")

Bash(ssh root@204.168.157.20 "sudo -u postgres psql modesp_cloud -c ""SELECT ''modesp/v1/pending/'' || REPLACE\(''device_E00008'', ''device_'', ''''\) || acl.suffix FROM \(SELECT ''/state/+'' AS suffix, 2 AS rw UNION ALL SELECT ''/status'', 2 UNION ALL SELECT ''/heartbeat'', 2 UNION ALL SELECT ''/cmd/+'', 1\) acl WHERE ''device_E00008'' LIKE ''device_%'' AND \(acl.rw = 4 OR \(4 = 4 AND acl.rw = 1\)\) AND NOT EXISTS \(SELECT 1 FROM devices WHERE mqtt_username = ''device_E00008'' AND status IN \(''pending'', ''active''\)\);""")

Bash(ssh root@204.168.157.20 "sudo -u postgres psql modesp_cloud -c ""SELECT sub.prefix || acl.suffix FROM \(SELECT CASE WHEN d.status = ''pending'' THEN ''modesp/v1/pending/'' || d.mqtt_device_id WHEN d.status = ''active'' THEN ''modesp/v1/'' || t.slug || ''/'' || d.mqtt_device_id END AS prefix FROM devices d LEFT JOIN tenants t ON t.id = d.tenant_id WHERE d.mqtt_username = ''device_F27FCD'' AND d.status IN \(''pending'', ''active''\)\) sub CROSS JOIN \(SELECT ''/state/+'' AS suffix, 2 AS rw UNION ALL SELECT ''/status'', 2 UNION ALL SELECT ''/heartbeat'', 2 UNION ALL SELECT ''/cmd/+'', 1\) acl WHERE \(acl.rw = 4 OR \(4 = 4 AND acl.rw = 1\)\) AND sub.prefix IS NOT NULL;""")
Bash(ssh root@204.168.157.20 "journalctl -u modesp-backend -n 30 --no-pager | tail -30")

Bash(ssh root@204.168.157.20 "journalctl -u mosquitto -n 30 --no-pager 2>/dev/null || tail -50 /var/log/mosquitto/mosquitto.log 2>/dev/null || echo ''Checking syslog...'' && grep -i mosquitto /var/log/syslog 2>/dev/null | tail -30")

Bash(ssh root@204.168.157.20 "sudo -u postgres psql modesp_cloud -c ""SELECT mqtt_device_id, mqtt_username, status, \(SELECT slug FROM tenants WHERE id = devices.tenant_id\) as tenant FROM devices ORDER BY mqtt_device_id;""")
Bash(ssh root@204.168.157.20 "journalctl -u modesp-backend --since ''2 min ago'' --no-pager | grep -E ''SubAck|subscribe|stuck|reset|E00002|E00003'' | tail -20")

Bash(ssh root@204.168.157.20 "journalctl -u modesp-backend --since ''1 min ago'' --no-pager")

Bash(ssh root@204.168.157.20 "journalctl -u mosquitto --since ''3 min ago'' --no-pager | head -30")

Bash(ssh root@204.168.157.20 "sudo -u postgres psql modesp_cloud -c ""SELECT mqtt_device_id, status, \(SELECT slug FROM tenants WHERE id = devices.tenant_id\) as tenant FROM devices WHERE mqtt_device_id = ''E00001'';""")
